form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.5 lengths at Shepparton over 390m (22.36) beating Commander King in Maiden on February 9. Draws the rail but this will test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.5 lengths at Shepparton over 390m (22.36) beating Commander King in Maiden on February 9. Draws the rail but this will test.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Ballarat to win by 3.5 lengths in 22.60, beating Ice Candy. Last start finished 4th in a T3 RSTW on April 8 over 390m at Ballarat behind Tribal Advisor beaten 2.5 lengths (22.67). Has claims if at his best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Ballarat to win by 3.5 lengths in 22.60, beating Ice Candy. Last start finished 4th in a T3 RSTW on April 8 over 390m at Ballarat behind Tribal Advisor beaten 2.5 lengths (22.67). Has claims if at his best.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 390m at Shepparton. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 390m at Shepparton. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 13 over 450m at Shepparton behind Border Beast beaten 5.5 lengths (25.88) in a Mix 6/7. Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 13 over 450m at Shepparton behind Border Beast beaten 5.5 lengths (25.88) in a Mix 6/7. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after claiming her maiden success on March 14 at this track over 425m. Last start was second over 425m in 24.46, behind Prickle. Has run slick time here with a 24.03 PB at the distance. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Nearing another win after claiming her maiden success on March 14 at this track over 425m. Last start was second over 425m in 24.46, behind Prickle. Has run slick time here with a 24.03 PB at the distance. Go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.37) at Shepparton in a T3 RSTW, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked and lost ground on first turn.
Quick to begin; Faltered in back straight and tailed off.

form.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (25.55) at Shepparton in a Mix 6/7. Has first look at box 8 this time. Others rate better this time.
